'''Jude Rozess''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] at a young age, Jude Rozess was taken to the the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] where she began [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] to learn the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]]. After passing through the [[Jedi academy|Temple academy]], Rozess was selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by one of the Order's [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]]. Training one-on-one for nearly a decade and crafting for herself a green-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], Rozess passed her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and was elevated to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] herself.<ref name="TCSWE" />

Pursuing the path of the [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]], Rozess focused her independent studies on becoming a [[Jedi Peacekeeper|Peacekeeper]]; specifically working with the [[Temple Security Force]]. In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], Rozess was stationed at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|entrance]] to the [[High Council Tower/Legends|High Council Tower]] of the Jedi Temple when a group of [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] [[Raid on the Jedi Temple (Yinchorri Uprising)|attacked]] the Temple. While putting up a valiant defense after having been surprised by the assault, Rozess was overcome by the sheer number of attackers and was slain by a Yinchorri commando. As she lay dying, her murderer gloated that she was his first kill just as she managed to impale him with her weapon, being the first and last time she would take a life.<ref name="TCSWE" />

Rozess was not the only Jedi to die in this raid. [[Tieren Nie-Tan]] would join her in becoming one with the Force.<ref name="AoW 2">[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 2|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 2]]</ref>
